## Verification

- [ ] `npm run release:check`
- [ ] `npm run release:dry-run`
- [ ] `npm run release:smoke`

## Naming And Attribution

- [ ] Vibe UI-owned workflow features use Vibe UI names.
- [ ] Upstream names appear only as source filters, resource ids, provenance, or attribution.
- [ ] `resource/open-design-attribution.md` remains current if upstream resources changed.
